cards.name: Chronostrike
cards.description: Deal 6 damage. Next turn, deal this damage again.

cards.name: Chronodefend
cards.description: Gain 5 Block. Next turn, gain this block again.

cards.name: Temporal Rift
cards.description: Choose a card in your discard pile. Play it twice.

cards.name: Entropy Blast
cards.description: Deal 20 damage. Costs 1 less for every turn passed this combat.

cards.name: Rewind
cards.description: Return the last card played this turn to your hand. It costs 0 this turn.
